Fix Caddy checksum verification: use SHA-512 to match upstream checksums

Caddy's checksums.txt uses SHA-512 (128 hex chars), but the verification
code expected SHA-256 (64 hex chars). This caused caddyChecksumFromFile
to skip valid hash entries and fail with 'failed to find sha256 checksum'.

Changes:
- Switch from crypto/sha256 to crypto/sha512
- Update hash length check from 64 to 128
- Rename sha256File to sha512File
- Update test to verify SHA-512 behavior

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
regime: expose BOCPD prior params with data-driven defaults

Add _resolve_bocpd_priors() that extracts prior hyper-parameters
(mu0, kappa0, alpha0, beta0) from the params dict.  When not
specified, defaults are derived from series statistics (mean, variance)
instead of the hard-coded bocpd_gaussian defaults.  Users can pass
prior_mode='fixed' to revert to the original constants.  Priors are
reported in params_used.priors for transparency.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Skip redundant normalized cache lookup when raw key was already checked

When can_use_raw_cache_key is true, the normalized key is identical to
the raw key that was already checked earlier. Wrap the normalized cache
lookup in `if (!can_use_raw_cache_key)` to avoid a redundant hash-map
lookup on the common path where all args are explicitly provided.

commit.message:
Fix character facing: set rotation after DOM connection via object3D

setAttribute('rotation') was called before appendChild, so A-Frame's
component initialisation timing could override or ignore the value.

Fix: move the Y-rotation calculation to after dom.charactersContainer
.appendChild(el) and write directly to el.object3D.rotation (THREE.js
radians, no A-Frame component involved).

atan2(dx, dz) rotates the entity so its local +Z (PlaneGeometry front
face) points toward the camera, making the character always face the user.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

regime: add TTL cache for walk-forward BOCPD calibration

The walk-forward quantile threshold calibration runs up to
max_windows × bootstrap_runs BOCPD invocations per call.  This adds
a thread-safe in-memory cache keyed on (series hash, hazard_lambda,
base_threshold, target_false_alarm_rate, max_windows, bootstrap_runs)
with configurable TTL (5 min) and max size (32 entries).  Repeated
calls with identical data skip the expensive bootstrap loop.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

regime: add canonical state ordering by ascending mean return

After HMM / MS-AR fitting and smoothing, state IDs depended on
random initialization and fitting order.  _canonicalize_regime_labels()
reorders states so that state 0 always corresponds to the lowest
mean value in the target series (typically the most bearish regime).
Also renumbers to eliminate gaps left by smoothing.

Applied automatically after smoothing in both HMM and MS-AR paths.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix capture: use tock() + disable xr.enabled + physical pixels

【サイズ巨大の原因】
tick() 内で renderer.render() を呼ぶと XR の ArrayCamera が
デバイス物理ピクセル座標の viewport を持ったまま介入し、
CSS ピクセルサイズの RenderTarget に対して拡大適用される。

【真っ暗の原因】
tick() は通常レンダー前に実行されるため、XR カメラ行列の
反映が不完全なフレームで描画していた。

【修正】
- tick() → tock(): 通常レンダー完了後に実行されるため
  sceneEl.camera.matrixWorld が正確な XR ポーズを保持。
- renderer.xr.enabled を一時 false: カスタム render() 呼び出しで
  XR ArrayCamera の viewport override を無効化。
- window.innerWidth/Height → renderer.domElement.width/height:
  物理ピクセル寸法を使用し AR 表示と同スケールに。
- 背景なし時は黒塗りでなく transparent に: キャラクターは見える。

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
iter10v2: router stabilization results — median F1=0.992, 2 perfect seeds

5-seed GPU validation with SafeWeightedCE fix + router zero-init:
  seed42:    F1=1.000 (was 0.839 in iter9) ← FIXED
  seed123:   F1=0.903 (was 0.987) ← regressed, BPFI=0.773
  seed777:   F1=1.000 (was 0.985) ← improved to perfect
  seed2024:  F1=0.989 (was 1.000) ← slight regression
  seed31415: F1=0.992 (was 0.845) ← FIXED

Aggregate: mean=0.977, median=0.992, std=0.041 (was 0.073)
4/5 seeds ≥0.97, 2/5 perfect. Campaign target: 0.993.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

regime: simplify namespace compatibility layer

Remove the function-rebinding machinery (_rebind_function,
_REBOUND_CACHE, _matches_module_file, _unwrap_function) which was
redundant with _sync_api_namespace(). The per-call sync already
pushes monkeypatched values back to the api module. A simple
for-loop import replaces _copy_namespace. ~60 lines removed.

commit.message:
forecast: extract explicit reconstruction modes with NaN propagation guard

Replace inline if-elif chain with a dispatch table of named inverse
functions (_inverse_log_return, _inverse_return, _inverse_pct,
_inverse_diff). NaN or inf from any step now halts the reconstruction
chain, preventing silent corruption of downstream values.

commit.message:
forecast: include unresolved-path terminal PnL in barrier EV

Paths that never hit TP or SL within the horizon now contribute their
mark-to-market PnL (price at horizon vs entry) to the EV calculation,
weighted by prob_neutral. Previously these paths contributed zero,
biasing EV toward zero when many paths remain unresolved. The new
ev_unresolved field is exposed in candidate results for transparency.

commit.message:
Fix black capture on mobile: move render into A-Frame system tick

WebXR の XR フレーム外（通常の requestAnimationFrame）から
renderer.render() を呼ぶと、XR コンポジターが WebGL アクセスを
制限するため黒になる。

解決策: AFRAME.registerSystem('photo-capture') の tick() 内で
renderer.setRenderTarget + render + readRenderTargetPixels を実行。
システムの tick は XR セッションのアニメーションフレーム内で
呼ばれるため、カメラ行列・WebGL コンテキストともに有効。

- hit-test.js: photo-capture システムを追加
  (tick 内で WebGLRenderTarget へのレンダリング + ピクセル読み取り)
- main.js: capturePhoto をシステムの request() 経由に変更
  (RAF ラッパーを削除してシャッターで即時トリガー)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
README: add 'How These Skills Work With Your Specs' section

Adds a top-level section explaining how index building and summary
extraction work generically, with dedicated subsections for OpenSpec,
Spec Kit, and custom layouts. Covers auto-detection behavior and
format-specific extraction strategy for each.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: spec-contextualize
repository.description: Skills to help agents load only the specs relevant to a task, and keep a growing spec library healthy over time.

commit.message:
forecast: add ComponentDispatchFn contract and params_applied metadata

Add a canonical ComponentDispatchFn type alias formalizing the ensemble
component dispatch signature. Track which per-method params were actually
dispatched to each successful component in metadata['params_applied'].

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: code review improvements and configurable map

- Fix incorrect log messages (EventId 1400: remove false 'migrations executed',
  EventId 2600: remove stray apostrophe)
- Fix nameof(LifePoint.Id) typo in Storage.OnModelCreating (should be Person.Id)
- Make StorageOptions and UserConfig internal; centralize DatabasePath computation
  in StorageOptions; change AddPersistence to accept IConfigurationManager so
  Persistence handles its own configuration setup
- Make PersonService internal
- Remove -1 sentinel from FilterLifePoints year filter; use null and string.Empty
- Add internal MapOptions class with configurable initial map position (latitude,
  longitude, zoom); wire up via IOptions<MapOptions> in Map component
- Replace DateTime.Now with injected TimeProvider in NewLifePointDateService
  and NewLifePoint razor component
- Ignore dotnet-coverage output files in .gitignore

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
